strings.settings.title: Goobaha
strings.settings.subtitle: Doorashooyinka Codsiga
strings.lang.title: Luuqadda
strings.lang.intro: Luuqadaha waaweyn ayaa hormarsan. Soo degsii luuqaddaada tarjumaad buuxda oo aan internet u baahnayn — sharaxaadaha, khuraafaadka iyo wixii kale.
strings.lang.failed: Soo degsiinta way ku guuldareysatay. Hubi xiriirka oo mar kale isku day.
strings.settings.night.desc: Cas qoto dheer ayaa ilaaliya indhaha baranay gudcurka — nuurka casiga ah wuxuu yar yar saameeynaa aragga habeenka.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: Waxay si toos ah u noqotaa cas marka cirka madoobaado kadib qorraxda dhacday.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Waxay ugu akhrisaa codka hadafka iyo hagitaannada — isticmaalka gacanla'aanta iyo dadka aragtida laanta.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Siimo yar si khadadka xiddigleyda iyo jidadka dayacyada ay u waafaqaan cirka dhabta ah.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Fur Birka oo Dhan
strings.paywall.subtitle: Hal mar iibso. Rumayn ma jirto, xisaab ma jirto — kaagiiye weligaa, oo dhan oo internet la'aan.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Xiddigaha, xiddigleyda iyo dayacyada oo dhan
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Makiinadda Wakhtiga — arag circa maalin kasta
strings.paywall.feature.events: Dhacdooyinka cirka — dayaxa dhacay, roobka xiddigaha, isku soo xidxid
strings.paywall.feature.night: Aragga habeenka oo dhan (huruud, toos, xoog)
strings.paywall.comingSoon: Iibsiyadu way furmi doonaan dhowaan — hadda isticmaal koodhka furitaanka.
strings.paywall.error: Wax baa qaldan. Mar kale isku day.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Dooro hadaf si aad ku raadsato cirka
strings.stars.title: Xiddigaha
strings.stars.subtitle: Xiddigaha {n} ugu dhalaalaysa ee magac leh
strings.deepsky.title: Cirka Qoto Dheer
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Xiddigaha {n}, nebyuuliyada, galaxiyada iyo kooxaha
strings.constellations.title: Xiddigleyda
strings.constellations.subtitle: Qaababka xiddigaha {n} ee caan ah
strings.satellites.title: Dayacyada
strings.events.title: Dhacdooyinka Cirka
strings.events.subtitle: Waxaa soo socda — Taabo si aad ugu safarto wakhtiga
strings.search.name: Raadi magac…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: Jecelide ma jirto — Fur wax, taabo ★ si aad u darsato.
strings.list.empty.visible: Waxba kuma jirto kor ee xadka hadda — Isku day "Tus Dhammaan".
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: Xiddigna kuma jirto liiska kor ee xadka hadda.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: Waxba xiddigta dheer ma jirto kor ee xadka hadda.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: Mid kamid ah xiddigleydan kuma jirto kor ee xadka hadda.
strings.sat.overheadShadow: Hadda kor ah laakiin hooska dhulka
strings.sat.noPass: Ka gudbid muuqata kuma jirto dhowaan
strings.fav.empty:
Jecelide ma jirto.
Fur meerayska ama xiddig kasta, taabo ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: Mid ka mid ah jeceliidaada kuma jirto kor ee xadka hadda.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} hoose ee xadka ayay tahay — Wax u fiirso hoos dhulka.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} hadda kor ma aha — Taabo macluumaadka ka gudbirka xiga.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Safarka Wakhtiga: {when} — Taabo si aad hadda ugu laabato
strings.point.permBody: Planet Pointer waxay muujisaa fallaadha hagitaan kaamiradda fiidiyaha toosan si uu u tilmaamo {name}.
strings.info.passNote: Wakhtiga deegaanka. Heer sarreeyaa = dhalaalaya, ka gudbid fudud.
strings.time.title: Makiinadda Wakhtiga
strings.time.subtitle: Arag cirka maalin kasta ama wakhti.
